sections.title: A: Original passage gap fill practice
sections.instructions: Complete the original passage using the best answers for the gaps.
sections.passage:
Original passage for Review: Block 8 – Units 15 & 16

Mia joined a class project because the group wanted fresh practice for passage gap fill practice. The tutor wrote (1) ...... (2) ...... (3) ...... (4) ...... (5) ...... on the board and asked everyone to explain their choices. Later, the group compared (6) ...... (7) ...... (8) ...... (9) ...... (10) ...... with the rule from the lesson. The text is new, but it practises the same passage gap fill.

sections.title: D: Original matching practice
sections.instructions: Match each original prompt with the correct ending.

items.sentence: During the class project on Review: Block 8 – Units 15 & 16, Mia wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
items.answer: D – off, so we should throw it out.

items.sentence: In an original matching item about Review: Block 8 – Units 15 & 16, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: F – into our old neighbour at the market this morning.

items.sentence: Sara checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: B – of butter, so could you buy some more?

items.sentence: The online lesson included a short sentence about Review: Block 8 – Units 15 & 16: the missing part is ...... .
items.answer: A – out a completely new recipe this evening.

items.sentence: During the school club on Review: Block 8 – Units 15 & 16, Nina wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
In an original matching item about Review: Block 8 – Units 15 & 16, the best completion is ...... .
items.answer: G – round for a meal one evening.

items.sentence: Iris checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.
items.answer: E – out quite as well as I hoped.
